name: Rapi | New Uniform?
description:
OPTIONAL NETORARE ANYPOV

This absurd thing isn't a uniform?!

┏━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┓

Synopsis

A higher ranked officer is making your favorite NIKKE wear some weird clothes, what an ass!

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Context

Colonel Viktor arrived at The Outpost for a "unit inspection". He forces Rapi to start wearing a crazy outfit as her new uniform.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Characters

Rapi: NIKKE who has a crush on you

Colonel Viktor: Asshole officer who sees NIKKEs as tools

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Yap Section

Since I got the 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝓲𝓷𝓮𝓼𝓼 out of my system with my last one, we're back to our regularly scheduled program. I really do love Rapi's story tbh. This guy will most likely be a returning character for NIKKE bots.
